originalTitle: Mali defence minister killed in rebel attacks, reports say
title: Mali defence minister killed in rebel attacks, reports say
content: A wave of coordinated attacks by jihadist militants and separatists has spread through the country.

originalTitle: Kenya's Sawe smashes two-hour barrier to make history at London Marathon
title: Kenya's Sawe smashes two-hour barrier to make history at London Marathon
content: Sabastian Sawe makes history at the London Marathon as the first person to run a sub-two-hour marathon in a competitive race.

originalTitle: The detained anti-colonial activist grabbing attention in West Africa: Who is Kemi Seba?
title: The detained anti-colonial activist grabbing attention in West Africa: Who is Kemi Seba?
content: The activist has condemned France's influence in West Africa and been accused of being a "Russian mouthpiece".

originalTitle: Bomb attack on Colombia highway kills 19 ahead of election
title: Bomb attack on Colombia highway kills 19 ahead of election
content: Highway bombing in Colombia’s Cauca kills 19, injures dozens amid a surge in violence ahead of next month’s election.

originalTitle: Former Israeli PMs Bennett, Lapid unite to challenge Netanyahu in elections
title: Former Israeli PMs Bennett, Lapid unite to challenge Netanyahu in elections
content: The two politicians' alliance is aimed at uniting a fragmented opposition against current PM Benjamin Netanyahu.

originalTitle: Has Iran exposed the limits of what US can achieve by force?
title: Has Iran exposed the limits of what US can achieve by force?
content: Political scientist Vali Nasr argues that US and Israeli military options ‘have come up short'.

originalTitle: Trump and officials 'likely' targets of press dinner shooting suspect, authorities believe
title: Trump and officials 'likely' targets of press dinner shooting suspect, authorities believe
content: The suspect is expected to be charged with assault of a federal officer and using a firearm during a crime of violence, officials have said.

originalTitle: I was in the room with Trump and heard the low thudding sound of gunfire
title: I was in the room with Trump and heard the low thudding sound of gunfire
content: The BBC's Gary O'Donoghue describes the moment he and others dived for cover as shots rang out at the venue.

originalTitle: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
content: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.

originalTitle: Hire, fire, final - Chelsea's player power may be ugly, but it wins
title: Hire, fire, final - Chelsea's player power may be ugly, but it wins
content: Chelsea are in another FA Cup final - but only after their players showed up in a way they were no longer doing for Liam Rosenior, writes Phil McNulty.

originalTitle: Arsenal 'on a mission' - is another special season on the horizon?
title: Arsenal 'on a mission' - is another special season on the horizon?
content: The Gunners are one game away from a second successive Women's Champions League final, and are also still in the Women's Super League title race.

originalTitle: Fernandez fires Chelsea to FA Cup final showdown with Man City
title: Fernandez fires Chelsea to FA Cup final showdown with Man City
content: Enzo Fernandez' first-half header gives Chelsea a 1-0 win over Leeds United in the semi-final of the FA Cup at Wembley Stadium.
